description: TechMo Gamified Repair Leaderboard — highest repair success rate, fastest turnaround, and daily stats. Designed for breakroom TV display.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  e.name AS metric,
  ROUND(
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'Completed' AND r2.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id), 0), 1
  ) AS value
FROM repairs r
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.assigned_technician_id
LEFT JOIN repairs r2
  ON r2.device_imei = r.device_imei
  AND r2.created_at BETWEEN r.completed_at AND r.completed_at + INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND r2.id <> r.id
WHERE r.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
  AND r.assigned_technician_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
HAVING COUNT(r.id) >= 5
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  e.name AS metric,
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (r.completed_at - r.created_at)) / 60)::numeric, 0) AS value
FROM repairs r
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.assigned_technician_id
WHERE r.status = 'Completed'
  AND r.completed_at IS NOT NULL
  AND r.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY value ASC
LIMIT 5

SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('day', r.created_at) AS time,
  e.name AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM repairs r
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.assigned_technician_id
WHERE r.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
GROUP BY 1, e.name
ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  e.name                                    AS "Technician",
  COUNT(r.id)                               AS "Total Repairs",
  SUM(CASE WHEN r.status='Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Completed",
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN r.status='Completed' AND r2.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(r.id),0), 1) AS "Success Rate",
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (r.completed_at - r.created_at))/60)::numeric,0) AS "Avg Minutes"
FROM repairs r
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.assigned_technician_id
LEFT JOIN repairs r2
  ON r2.device_imei = r.device_imei
  AND r2.created_at BETWEEN r.completed_at AND r.completed_at + INTERVAL '14 days'
  AND r2.id <> r.id
WHERE r.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY e.id, e.name
ORDER BY "Success Rate" DESC NULLS LAST

title: TechMo Repair Leaderboard
